_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 19:57 UTC tick — 0 unconsumed events heartbeat. Live tape refresh (gold $4752, WTI $92.99, USDJPY 159.54 from confluence). All 4 alerts KEEP; 3 MODIFY (price refs + USDJPY/gold/oil context), 1 KEEP-as-is (audusd). 9 structure_watch KEEP. 8 news_queries KEEP (2 RE-TUNED last tick still filtering). Counterfactual: usdjpy fade 1f/100%/100%/100% thin; oil_crude_retest_90_buy 3f/67/67/100 real edge; gold 10f/90/80/0 short ok 24h bleeds; audusd 1f/100/0/100 thin. No fires>=3 hit<30% → no auto-REMOVE. No level hits, no trades.

level_alerts.note: MODIFIED 22:33 UTC — buy AUDUSD 0.707 support on Iran-escalation spike. Live 22:32 UTC 0.71596 (+12.8p vs 12:42 0.71468, 88.6p above trigger — drifted further away). Crude +3% without gold joining = oil-specific supply story not broad escalation; BTC +4.14% day confirms risk-ON persists, weakening AUD-spike-to-support thesis. Setup requires a fresh shock rung (US casualties, formal Iran walkout, Hormuz reopen denial) to re-energize. SL 0.703, TP 0.7187 on 0.707 rejection wick + risk-off confirm. Conv 3 currently, skip naked breaks. | REFRESH 2026-04-22T19:57:00Z: KEEP — still 88.6p above 0.707, drifted further away on persistent risk-on, BTC+4%

level_alerts.note: MODIFIED 22:33 UTC — buy GOLD 4775 breakout. Live 22:32 UTC 4733.30 (-19.5p vs 15:55 4752.76, now 41.7p below trigger). level_alerts.note: ADDED 22:33 UTC — buy WTI 90.30 retest of broken 90 resistance as new support. Live 22:32 UTC 92.94 (+639p vs 16:53 86.55, +3.07% on day, day high 93.39). Clean break above 90 on Hormuz blockade re-rating (IRGC seized 2 ships + fired on 3rd Apr 22) — gold NOT joining the move confirms this is oil-supply specific. Anticipation logic: pullback to 90.30 with M15 reject wick + hold = buy. If price accepts below 90 (closes M15 < 89.80) thesis dead. SL 89.20 (90p risk), TP1 93.50 (daily high break, ~320p), TP2 95.00 (~470p). Conv 4: fresh structural break + clear invalidation. Skip if price just slices through 90 without any reaction (= new supply or Hormuz-reopen news). | REFRESH 2026-04-22T19:57:00Z: MODIFY — live $92.99 (+5p vs 92.94 last ref), day range 87.67-93.73 = massive 6-pt swing; still 267p above 90.30 retest buy zone (far). Keep — counterfactual 3f/67/67/100 remains strong edge
